_comment: Golden fixtures for vertex-evaluation-v2 regression tests. passBModelOutput may be intentionally over-optimistic to exercise clamps.

cases.name: identical_vague
cases.description: shared == confidential, all vague ('ASAP', 'world-class'). All coverage false. Model returns high/0.95. Expect: 0.65 cap, high→medium downgrade, identical-tiers warning, missing >= 1.
cases.sharedText: We will build a world-class scalable system ASAP with top dashboards and enterprise support.
cases.confidentialText: We will build a world-class scalable system ASAP with top dashboards and enterprise support.

missing_info: Timeline is vague ('ASAP') — no dates or milestones.
No KPIs or success criteria defined.

why: Executive Summary: The proposal describes a scalable platform with enterprise support ambitions.
Key Strengths: The team's commitment to a world-class solution is clear.
Key Risks: No specific risks have been identified in the proposal.
Decision Readiness: The proposal lacks specifics needed for a confident decision.
Recommendations: Define concrete deliverables, timeline, and success criteria.

cases.name: vague_non_identical
cases.description: Both texts are vague but different. All coverage false. Model returns high/0.9. Expect: 0.65 cap, no identical-tiers warning.
cases.sharedText: Our solution will be top-tier and scalable for enterprise clients with world-class service.
cases.confidentialText: Internal planning is ongoing. Budget and timeline remain under review with no firm commitments.

missing_info: No KPIs or success criteria present.

why: Executive Summary: The proposal conveys ambition but lacks specifics.
Key Strengths: Enterprise focus and commitment to quality.
Key Risks: No concrete risks identified in the proposal text.
Decision Readiness: Insufficient detail for a go/no-go decision.
Recommendations: Provide timeline, KPIs, and defined deliverables.

cases.name: scope_only
cases.description: Only has_scope=true (coverageCount=1 < 3). Model returns high/0.9. Expect 0.65 cap, high→medium downgrade.
cases.sharedText: Deliverables include a CRM dashboard, customer portal, and monthly reporting module.
cases.confidentialText: Internal strategic priority. No timeline confirmed. Budget allocation pending approval.

factSheet.project_goal: Build and deliver CRM dashboard, customer portal, and reporting module.

why: Executive Summary: Three concrete deliverables are identified.
Key Strengths: Scope is defined with three named modules.
Key Risks: No timeline or constraints make feasibility hard to assess.
Decision Readiness: Scope defined but no KPIs, timeline, or risk register.
Recommendations: Define timeline, KPIs, constraints, and key risks.

cases.name: timeline_scope_constraints_no_kpis_risks
cases.description: coverageCount=3 (scope+timeline+constraints). KPIs and risks absent → 0.75 cap. proposalId stabilises style. Implementation Notes expected (has_timeline). No Vendor Fit Notes (no vendor_preferences).
cases.sharedText: Analytics platform to be delivered over 6 months. Scope includes dashboard, reporting, and user management. Must comply with existing SLAs and deployment windows.
cases.confidentialText: Internal: delivery cadence approved as monthly sprints. Governance review required before go-live.

factSheet.project_goal: Deliver analytics platform with dashboard and reporting in 6 months.
missing_info: No KPIs or success criteria defined.

why: Executive Summary: Well-scoped project with a clear 6-month timeline and SLA constraints.
Key Strengths: Timeline and scope are both defined with milestones.
Key Risks: No risks identified — this is a gap in the proposal.
Decision Readiness: Missing KPIs and risk register prevent a confident go/no-go.
Recommendations: Define KPIs, success criteria, and a risk register.
Implementation Notes: 6-month timeline with three defined milestones provides a delivery framework.
missing: No KPIs or success criteria defined.

cases.name: full_coverage_no_vendor
cases.description: All 5 coverage flags true. No vendor_preferences. No api/data keywords in deliverables. No budget keywords in constraints. Expect: no clamps, all required headings, Implementation Notes (has_timeline), no Vendor Fit/Commercial/Data-Security Notes.
cases.sharedText: Analytics dashboard to be delivered in 6 months with defined KPIs, risk register, SLA constraints, and monthly milestones.
cases.confidentialText: Internal: governance approval secured. Sprint velocity confirmed. Infrastructure allocation locked for the programme.

factSheet.project_goal: Deliver analytics dashboard with full governance approval and defined KPIs.
constraints: Requires governance sign-off before each phase
success_criteria_kpis: Zero P1 incidents in first 90 days
assumptions: Key stakeholders available for weekly reviews

why: Executive Summary: Well-specified proposal with full coverage across scope, timeline, KPIs, constraints, and risks.
Key Strengths: Defined KPIs, a clear 6-month timeline with milestones, and an identified risk register.
Key Risks: Scope creep and key-person dependency are identified with appropriate impact ratings.
Decision Readiness: Proposal is largely decision-ready; governance sign-off process is well-defined.
Recommendations: Clarify escalation paths and validate KPI baselines before go-live.
Implementation Notes: 6-month delivery with phased milestones provides a solid execution framework.

cases.name: data_security_triggered
cases.description: Full coverage. scope_deliverables mention 'API integration' and 'data pipeline' → Data & Security Notes instructed. vendor_preferences non-empty → Vendor Fit Notes instructed. Expect no clamps.
cases.sharedText: Platform to include API integration layer, data pipeline module, and real-time analytics. Timeline: 8 months with defined KPIs and risk register.
cases.confidentialText: Internal: approved vendors are AWS and Snowflake. Budget locked. Infrastructure team engaged.

factSheet.project_goal: Build API integration, data pipeline, and analytics platform in 8 months.
assumptions: Data residency approval obtained before Month 2

why: Executive Summary: Technically detailed proposal with full coverage across all evaluation dimensions.
Key Strengths: Concrete API and data pipeline deliverables with quantified KPIs and vendor preferences.
Key Risks: Third-party API instability and data volume uncertainty are well-identified.
Decision Readiness: Decision-ready with strong specificity; data residency lead time is the key dependency.
Recommendations: Confirm data residency approval timeline and validate API SLA with vendors.
Implementation Notes: 8-month phased delivery with 3 milestones provides clear checkpoints.
Data & Security Notes: API integration and data pipeline components require data residency and security review.
Vendor Fit Notes: AWS and Snowflake preferences align with stated infrastructure and data warehouse needs.
